arts.ttl: Manchester United youngster wants more than €4.5m after tax to leave – Red Devils being flexible on fee
arts.sum: Over the past couple of days, talk around Alejandro Garnacho’s future at Manchester United has calmed down considerably. However, speculation has now grown in Italy again. Chelsea were mentioned as a keen candidate to land the Argentine but now Napoli are back in the race for the player. arts.sum: Ajax can repay Man Utd for Ten Hag and Antony with THIS transfer Now the Johan Cruyff Arena club may just start to repay the favour, though, by completing a move that could unlock another problem player for Amorim: Marcus Rashford .

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Christopher Nkunku hope after ‘NO CHANCE’ message
arts.sum: Man Utd have looked a strong option for Nkunku, but they have been told the only way they could sign the versatile attacker permanently would be to strike a deal with Chelsea for Alejandro Garnacho. “Manchester United have looked into the possibility of a deal for Christopher Nkunku, but there would only be a loan,” Sky Sports News transfer expert Dharmesh Sheth reported.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes desperate plea to Marcus Rashford over Man Utd exile
